items.blinded_text: This market will resolve to the player who wins the Event A, scheduled for relative-date-1 , specified-time ET. If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the Event A per the rules set by the competition (e.g., disqualification, player withdraws), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”. If the Event A is cancelled, postponed past relative-date-2 , specified-time ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to "Other". The primary resolution source for this market will be information from the Entity B.

question: Will Entity A win the Event A?
